title: Alpha Void
description: A long forgotten world rests beneath bedrock, stay down there for too long and you may be forgotten too.
body:
AlphaVoid

AlphaVoid is a mod for Forge 1.20.1 that recreates the unsettling feelings many players experienced during the earlier versions of Minecraft. This mod combines nostalgia with the horror genre to also feature a new dimension, a custom progression system, and a spooky encounter that you shouldn’t activate.

The Alpha Dimension

As you progress through the mod, you can enter the Alpha Dimension, which resembles the earliest versions of Minecraft. There is an air of wrongness about the dimension, but you can’t enter without sufficient preparation. The hostile environment will damage you, and you’ll need to figure out how to build Dimensional Armor to survive the treacherous conditions. Once you do survive, you can collect powerful ancient liquids that will help you craft a powerful armory.

We recommend using Not Enough Items (NEI) with this mod to access crafting recipes.
Please view the wiki for any help needed with this mod.

Requirements:

Forge 1.20.1

Dependencies:

ModernerBeta 1.20.1
